---
title: "Marco Pelliccia"
subtitle: "PhD · Birkbeck, University of London<br> Economist · Academic · Data Scientist"
image: images/profile.jpg
page-layout: full
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:mpellicciawork@gmail.com
---





## About 

I am an economist and Assistant Professor at Edinburgh Business School, Heriot-Watt University. I hold a PhD in Economics from Birkbeck, University of London, where I specialised in the economics of networks and game theory.

My research focuses on how strategic interactions and interdependencies across agents shape economic outcomes, with applications to market design, policy analysis, and risk in interconnected systems.

I have over ten years' experience in higher education, teaching courses in microeconomics, game theory, and economic policy. I have also completed the MIT Applied Data Science Program, where I developed applied skills in machine learning, statistical modelling, and AI for data-driven decision-making.

[Download CV](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/n0wkjcrwjxm8phx2dq726/CV_MP.pdf?rlkey=cx2f5yeqqj0vmzupmdwbetg2v&e=1&st=jq6t2pyb&dl=0){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}

## Research Interests

- Microeconomic Theory
- Network Economics & Game Theory
- Market Design & Policy Analysis
- Machine Learning & Data-Driven Analysis


## News

<ul class="news-list">
  <li class="news-recent">Presented at TMF in London, January 2026, UK</li>
  <li class="news-old">Presented at CMID24 in Budapest, June 2024, HU</li>
  <li class="news-old">Presented at CoED23 in Girona, June 2023, ES</li>
  <li class="news-old">Presented Networks and Econ Policy to Scottish Government Assistant Economists meeting, March 2023, UK</li>
  <li class="news-old">Attended SGPE Conference in Crieff, January 2023, UK</li>
  <li class="news-old">Presented at 2022 European ESA, August 2022, IT</li>
  <li class="news-old">Presented at SUNBELT 2022, July 2022, AU</li>
  <li class="news-old">Presented the CNEE Workshop "Economics of Networks", May 2022</li>
</ul>
:::


<!--
## Ask about research, teaching, and background




```{=html}
<script type="module" src="https://gradio.s3-us-west-2.amazonaws.com/5.49.1/gradio.js"></script>
<div style="width: 100%; margin: 20px 0;">
  <div style="width: 100%; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; min-height: 500px;">
    <gradio-app style="width: 100%;" src="https://ddmarco-career-conversation.hf.space"></gradio-app>
  </div>
</div>
```
-->
